message:
fix: resolvePath skips ../.. for absolute paths, basename/dirname edge cases

- resolvePath now resolves . and .. for absolute paths (was returning
  raw path like foo/../bar instead of bar)
- basename strips trailing slashes (basename /foo/ now returns foo)
- dirname / now returns / instead of .
- Extract upsertFileIndex/removeFileIndex in workspace.ts to deduplicate
  reconcileIndex and handleIndexInvalidate (~20 lines removed)
